title: Mermaid diagram editor with live preview and validation
purpose: Provides a full-featured diagram editing interface with split-pane layout, syntax validation, and keyboard shortcuts for Mermaid diagrams.
module_context: Exports a DiagramEditor React component that manages diagram state, handles user interactions, and integrates with session and diagram stores. Includes keyboard shortcuts, validation, and context menus for nodes and edges.

steps.content: Set the validation state to indicate that validation is in progress.
Trim the input content to remove leading and trailing whitespace.
IF the trimmed content is empty, mark the diagram as valid and return.
Attempt to parse the diagram content using the Mermaid library.
IF parsing succeeds, mark the diagram as valid.
IF parsing fails, capture the error message and mark the diagram as invalid.
Update the editor content state with the new value.
Update the changes state to reflect whether the content differs from the saved diagram.
IF the diagram is invalid or has no changes, set an error message and return.
Set the saving state to indicate that the save operation is in progress.
Update the diagram in the store with the new content and timestamp.
Update the editor state to reflect that saving is complete and changes have been saved.
Clear the saved timestamp after a delay to show the success message.
IF the save operation fails, set an error message in the editor state.
Reset the editor content to match the saved diagram content.
Update the editor state to indicate that there are no changes.
Split the editor content into lines for processing.
Create a new edge line representing the transition between nodes.
Find an appropriate insertion point for the new edge line.
Insert the new edge line at the calculated position.
Update the editor content with the modified diagram.
Update the changes state to reflect that the content has been modified.

methods.name: handleChangeEdgeEndpoint
methods.normalized_params: (oldSource: string, oldTarget: string, newSource: string, newTarget: string): void

steps.content: Split the editor content into lines for processing.
Create a regular expression pattern to match the edge line with old endpoints.
Replace the old endpoints in each matching line with the new endpoints.
Join the modified lines back into a single string.
Update the editor content with the modified diagram.
Update the changes state to reflect that the content has been modified.
IF in add-transition selection mode and a source node is pending, complete the transition.
IF in change-origin selection mode and edge info is pending, update the edge origin.
IF in change-destination selection mode and edge info is pending, update the edge destination.
ELSE show a context menu for the clicked node.

methods.name: handleEdgeClick
methods.normalized_params: (source: string, target: string, event: MouseEvent): void

steps.content: Split the editor content into lines for processing.

Build the style line for the node based on its type.
Find an appropriate insertion point for the new node.
Insert the node definition and style lines at the calculated position.
Update the editor content with the modified diagram.
Update the changes state to reflect that the content has been modified.

Join the modified lines back into a single string.

Update the changes state to reflect that the content has been modified.
Find the line number of the node definition.

Find the line number of the node style.

Remove the specified lines from the editor content.
Update the editor content with the modified diagram.
Update the changes state to reflect that the content has been modified.
Close the node context menu.
